name: Profound Medical Corp.
summary: Profound Medical Corp. is a commercial-stage medical device company focused on AI-powered, MRI-guided, incision-free therapies for ablation of diseased tissue. Its lead product, TULSA-PRO, uses real-time MRI, robotically-driven transurethral ultrasound, and closed-loop temperature feedback to ablate prostate tissue for cancer and BPH. Its Sonalleve system treats uterine fibroids, bone metastases, osteoid osteoma, and benign desmoid tumors. The company generates revenue from capital equipment sales and recurring one-time-use disposable devices.

products.name: TULSA-PRO
products.description: MRI-guided, robotically-driven transurethral ultrasound ablation system for prostate cancer and BPH; FDA cleared, CE Marked, and Health Canada approved.

products.name: Sonalleve
products.description: MRI-guided focused ultrasound system for uterine fibroids, bone metastases, osteoid osteoma, and benign desmoid tumors; CE Marked, FDA HDE approved, and approved in China and South Korea.

products.name: Thermal Boost module
products.description: Add-on for TULSA-PRO enabling temporarily increased ablation target temperature in treatment boundary regions for large prostates.

partnerships.description: TULSA-PRO and Sonalleve systems are compatible with select Philips MRI scanners.
TULSA-PRO and Sonalleve systems are compatible with select Siemens MRI scanners.
TULSA-PRO and Sonalleve systems are compatible with select GE Healthcare MRI scanners.
